capability_note: No supplied GCI row for GLM-4.6. Capability score conservatively uses supplied GLM-4.5 GCI; Stanford HAI issue brief lists GLM-4.6 separately with Arena Elo 1442 and MMLU-Pro 82.8.

No supplied GCI row for gpt-oss-120b. Score is scaled from the supplied gpt-oss-20b GCI by the official OpenAI MMLU ratio: 0.861 * (90.0 / 85.3) = 0.908. OpenAI's model card also reports stronger 120B performance on GPQA, HLE, Codeforces, SWE-Bench, and HealthBench; third-party findings that 20B wins on selected tests are noted but not used as the general capability score.
